title: cymbopogon flexuosus var. microstachys
intro: Cymbopogon flexuosus var. microstachys, also known as East Indian lemongrass, is a variant of the Cymbopogon flexuosus plant, a type of grass native to tropical Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Cymbopogon flexuosus var. microstachys include reducing stress and anxiety, alleviating menstrual cramps, and supporting digestion, among others. In terms of herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant can be used to make teas, essential oils, and infusions for medicinal and culinary purposes.
